elements.name: Page title shows the app name

steps.name: I open my browser to http://localhost:5000
I wait for the page to fully load (network activity stops)
the browser tab title should contain "Advance Insights"

elements.name: Header bar displays AAP branding

steps.name: I should see a header bar at the top of the page
the header contains the AAP logo (red/black automotive logo on the left)
the header shows the text "ADVANCE" in bold
the header shows the text "INSIGHTS" next to it
the header shows "Rewards & Loyalty Intelligence" as a tagline

elements.name: All 6 agent tabs are visible in the left sidebar

steps.name: I should see a vertical tab strip on the left side

result.error_message: Note: At desktop resolution tabs render as a horizontal strip beneath the header (per user clarification, this is expected). Vertical sidebar is mobile only.

steps.name: the following tabs are listed (top to bottom)
"Crew Chief" is the currently selected tab (highlighted or active state)

elements.name: Chat input area is ready for typing

steps.name: I should see a text input area at the bottom of the page
the input has placeholder text "Ask a question..."
the input is not disabled (I can click into it)
there is a send button (arrow icon) to the right of the input

elements.name: Header action buttons are present

steps.name: in the top-right area of the header I should see New Chat, Show Reasoning, Documentation buttons
I should see a user name or "Connected" text
I should see a "Sign out" text button

elements.name: Suggestions button is available

steps.name: near the input area I should see a lightbulb icon button
this button has the label or title "Suggestions"

elements.name: Welcome message is displayed for default agent

steps.name: in the chat area I should see a welcome message
the welcome message says something like "I coordinate the full team"

elements.name: No error messages or broken elements

steps.name: I should NOT see any JavaScript error dialogs
I should NOT see any "Setup Required" message
I should NOT see any broken image icons (missing images)
the page should NOT show a login screen (since proxy mode is active)

elements.name: Switch to Pit Crew agent

steps.name: I click the "Pit Crew" tab in the left sidebar
the "Pit Crew" tab should appear selected/highlighted
the active agent label in the header should update to show "Pit Crew"

result.error_message: Note: The header does not display a dedicated active-agent label, but the welcome heading and selected tab clearly indicate Pit Crew is active. Treated as passed; see observations.

steps.name: the chat area should show a welcome message containing "Ready to dig into service data"
the tab text and accent color should be blue

elements.name: Switch to GearUp agent

steps.name: I click the "GearUp" tab in the left sidebar
the "GearUp" tab should appear selected/highlighted
the active agent label in the header should update to show "GearUp"
the chat area should show a welcome message containing "Let's check in on the loyalty program"
the tab text and accent color should be gold/yellow

elements.name: Switch to Ignition agent

steps.name: I click the "Ignition" tab in the left sidebar
the "Ignition" tab should appear selected/highlighted
the active agent label in the header should update to show "Ignition"
the chat area should show a welcome message containing "Campaigns, promotions, engagement"
the tab text and accent color should be orange

elements.name: Switch to PartsPro agent

steps.name: I click the "PartsPro" tab in the left sidebar
the "PartsPro" tab should appear selected/highlighted
the active agent label in the header should update to show "PartsPro"
the chat area should show a welcome message containing "Products, categories, inventory"
the tab text and accent color should be green

elements.name: Switch to DieHard agent

steps.name: I click the "DieHard" tab in the left sidebar
the "DieHard" tab should appear selected/highlighted
the active agent label in the header should update to show "DieHard"
the chat area should show a welcome message containing "Store performance, operations"
the tab text and accent color should be red

elements.name: Switch back to Crew Chief

steps.name: I have switched to the "DieHard" tab
I click the "Crew Chief" tab in the left sidebar
the "Crew Chief" tab should appear selected/highlighted
the chat area should show a welcome message containing "I coordinate the full team"
the tab text and accent color should be black

elements.name: Chat history is preserved when switching tabs

steps.name: I am on the "Crew Chief" tab
I type "hello" in the input and press Enter
I wait for the agent to respond (up to 30 seconds)
I click the "GearUp" tab
then I click back to "Crew Chief"
I should still see my "hello" message and the agent's response

elements.name: Unread indicator appears for background messages

steps.name: I am on the "Crew Chief" tab
I send a question that the Crew Chief will route to multiple agents
I switch to a different tab before all responses arrive
tabs with new responses should show an unread indicator (dot or badge)

name: Chat Flow — Send and Receive Messages

elements.name: Send a simple question to GearUp (Loyalty agent)

steps.name: I click the "GearUp" tab
I click into the text input at the bottom
I type "How many active loyalty members do we have?"
I click the Send button (arrow icon to the right of input)
my message should appear as a user bubble in the chat area
a loading/thinking indicator should appear below my message
within 30 seconds, an agent response bubble should appear
the response should contain text (not be empty)
the response should mention numbers or member-related information

elements.name: Send a question using Enter key

steps.name: I am on the "Pit Crew" tab
I click into the text input
I type "What are the top complaint categories?"
I press the Enter key (not Shift+Enter)
my message should be sent (input clears)
a user bubble with my question appears in the chat
within 30 seconds, an agent response appears

elements.name: Input clears after sending

steps.name: I am on any agent tab
I type "test question" in the input and send it
the input field should be empty after sending
the input should remain focused and ready for another question

elements.name: Cannot send empty message

steps.name: I am on any agent tab
the input field is empty
I click the Send button
no message should be sent
no new bubbles should appear in the chat area

elements.name: Agent response includes formatted content

steps.name: I am on the "PartsPro" tab
I send "Show me the top 10 selling products this month"
I wait for the response (up to 45 seconds — data queries may be slower)
the response should appear with readable formatting
the response should not be raw markdown (it should be rendered HTML)

elements.name: Multiple messages create a conversation thread

steps.name: I am on the "GearUp" tab
I send "How many members are in Gold tier?"
I wait for the response
then I send "What about Platinum tier?"
I wait for the response
I should see 4 bubbles total: user, agent, user, agent
they should be in chronological order (top to bottom)
the second response should understand the context of the first question

elements.name: New Chat button clears conversation

steps.name: I am on any tab with an existing conversation (at least one exchange)
I click the New Chat button (+ icon in the header)
the chat area should be cleared
only the welcome message should remain
the input should be empty and ready

elements.name: Long response renders without breaking layout

steps.name: I am on the "Crew Chief" tab
I send "Give me a cross-department summary of Q4 performance"
I wait for the response (up to 60 seconds — Crew Chief routes to multiple agents)
the response should render fully without overflowing the chat area
I should be able to scroll through the response if it's long
the input bar should remain visible at the bottom

elements.name: Open suggestions panel via lightbulb button

steps.name: I am on the "Crew Chief" tab
I click the lightbulb icon button near the input area
a suggestions panel should slide out or appear
it should contain a list of sample questions
the questions should be relevant to the Crew Chief agent

elements.name: Click a suggestion to populate input

steps.name: I am on the "GearUp" tab
I open the suggestions panel (click lightbulb)
I click on one of the listed sample questions
that question text should appear in the chat input field

result.error_message:
Expected: clicking a suggestion populates the input field with that question text so the user can edit before sending
Observed: clicking the suggestion immediately submits the question as a chat message; input remains empty and the question appears as a user bubble with the agent already responding

steps.name: the suggestions panel should close (or remain open — either is fine)
the input should be ready to send (I can press Enter or click Send)

elements.name: Suggestions change per agent

steps.name: I am on the "Ignition" tab
I open the suggestions panel
the sample questions should be marketing/campaign related
I close the panel (if needed) and switch to the "DieHard" tab
I open the suggestions panel again
the sample questions should be store/operations related
they should be different from what Ignition showed

elements.name: Close suggestions panel

steps.name: the suggestions panel is open
I click the lightbulb button again (or click outside the panel)
the suggestions panel should close/hide
the main chat area should be fully visible again

elements.name: Mystery Question dice button

steps.name: I am on any agent tab
I look near the input area for a dice icon button
I click the dice button
the dice should show a spin animation
within 10 seconds a question should appear in the input field
the dice should stop spinning and show random pips (dots)

elements.name: Toggle reasoning panel open via header button

steps.name: I click the reasoning toggle button in the header (brain/info icon)
a panel should slide out from the right side of the screen
the panel should have a header or title like "Agent Reasoning"
the chat area should resize to make room for the panel

elements.name: Toggle reasoning panel closed

steps.name: the reasoning panel is open
I click the reasoning toggle button again
the panel should slide closed (hide to the right)
the chat area should expand back to full width

elements.name: Reasoning steps appear after asking a question

steps.name: I am on the "GearUp" tab
the reasoning panel is open
I send "How many Gold tier members do we have?"
I wait for the response (up to 30 seconds)
the reasoning panel should show a new group/section for this question
within the group I should see one or more reasoning steps
each step should show text describing what the agent did
each step should show a duration (e.g., "2.3s" or similar timing)

elements.name: Reasoning groups are collapsible

steps.name: I have asked at least 2 questions and received responses
the reasoning panel is open
I should see 2 reasoning groups (one per question)
I click the header of the first group
it should collapse (hide its steps)
I click it again
it should expand (show its steps again)

elements.name: Token usage is displayed

steps.name: I have asked a question and received a response
the reasoning panel is open
somewhere in the reasoning panel I should see token counts
the numbers should be reasonable (hundreds to thousands)

elements.name: Click agent avatar to open reasoning for that interaction

steps.name: I have asked a question and received a response
the reasoning panel is CLOSED
I click the agent avatar/icon to the left of the agent's response bubble
the reasoning panel should slide open
it should scroll to (or highlight) the reasoning group for that specific response

elements.name: Methodology extraction appears in reasoning

steps.name: I am on the "Ignition" tab
the reasoning panel is open
I send "What campaigns had the highest response rates last quarter?"
I wait for the response (up to 45 seconds)
if the response originally contained methodology/reasoning text
that methodology should appear in the reasoning panel (not in the chat bubble)

result.error_message: Scenario not executed in this run; conditional/optional spec deferred to a focused pass.

elements.name: Multiple agents show separate reasoning when Crew Chief routes

steps.name: I am on the "Crew Chief" tab
the reasoning panel is open
I send "Compare loyalty program performance with marketing campaign results"
I wait for the full response (up to 60 seconds — multi-agent query)
the reasoning panel should show groups from multiple agents
each group should identify which agent produced it (by name or color)

elements.name: Copy button is visible on agent response

steps.name: I am on the "GearUp" tab
I send "How many total members are in the program?"
I wait for the agent to respond
the agent response bubble should have a copy button

elements.name: Click copy button copies response text

steps.name: there is an agent response with a copy button visible
I click the copy button on the agent response
I should see a brief confirmation (tooltip change, checkmark, or "Copied!" text)
I click into the chat input and press Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V)
the pasted content should match the agent's response text

elements.name: Copy button works on responses with tables

steps.name: I am on the "PartsPro" tab
I send "Show me top 5 product categories by revenue"
I wait for the response (should include a table)
I click the copy button on that response
the copied content should include the table data

elements.name: Each response has its own copy button

steps.name: I am on any agent tab
I send two questions and receive two responses
each response bubble should have its own separate copy button
clicking copy on the second response should only copy that response

elements.name: Copy button does not copy user messages

steps.name: there is a conversation with user and agent messages
only the agent response bubbles should have copy buttons
user message bubbles should NOT have a copy button
